spec_natural_language: function _Settlement_init() MUST NOT be callable by unauthorized users after the contract has been initialized

violated_invariant.precondition: contract has already been initialized or caller is not the deployer/authorized initializer
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: The function should revert when called by any unauthorized user or when the contract is already initialized

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly identifies that _Settlement_init is public without access control, allowing any user to reinitialize the contract. The vulnerability is a classic initialization pattern issue where a public init function can be called multiple times by unauthorized users to manipulate owner and role assignments.
